Pasta Carbonara: Cook 400g spaghetti in generously salted boiling water until al dente, reserving 1 cup of pasta cooking water before draining. While pasta cooks, render 150g guanciale (or pancetta) in a large skillet over medium heat until crispy, then remove the pan from heat. Whisk together 4 egg yolks, 1 whole egg, 80g finely grated Pecorino Romano, and a generous amount of black pepper in a bowl. Working quickly, toss the hot drained pasta with the guanciale and its fat, then add the egg mixture off heat, adding splashes of pasta water to create a creamy sauce that coats every strand.
